title: L'abito nero da sposa
writer: Ennio Flaiano, Riccardo Freda, Gherardo Gherardi
actors: Fosco Giachetti, Jacqueline Laurent, Enzo Fiermonte
plot: In Renaissance Rome, the captain of Strozzi mercenary kills the banker Chigi that has refused the hand of his daughter Berta, girlfriend of Giuliano de 'Medici, brother of Cardinal Giovanni. Accused of the crime is instead the you...
